sentence_reviews.text: Model merging combines compatible checkpoints or parameter deltas in weight space to obtain a new model without conventional joint retraining.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: It offers a low-cost route to combine specialized capabilities, ensembling effects, or independently fine-tuned variants.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Combining fine-tuned checkpoints cheaply is supported; specialized capabilities and ensembling effects are broader synthesis.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Checkpoint/weight averaging is directly supported by Model Soups.
